topStories.title: 'Door Not Closed Yet': Pakistan, Egypt, Turkey Push For Breakthrough In US-Iran Talks
topStories.description: "We are not in a complete deadlock. The door is not closed yet," the report quoted a source, privy to the US-Iran talks, as saying.

topStories.title: US to ‘vigorously prosecute’ of buyers and sellers of sanctioned Iranian oil as Hormuz blockade begins
topStories.description: The US Navy has begun implementing a blockade on maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports, in line with orders from President Donald Trump, following the collapse of US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad.

topStories.title: Trump's Iran Blockade Sees "Elimination" Warning, "Pure Propaganda" Retort
topStories.description: In a social media post on Monday, Trump claimed that Iran's navy had already been largely destroyed in the fighting, with 158 ships sunk.

topStories.title: Gold Futures Drop To Rs 1.51 Lakh/10G As Hormuz Blockade Fears Shake Sentiment
topStories.description: In the overseas market, Comex gold futures for the June contract fell $51.40, or 1.07%, to $4,736 per ounce in New York.

topStories.title: Zohran Mamdani marks 100 days as NYC mayor: A look at Democratic Socialist's 3 new priorities and 'pothole politics'
topStories.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has completed his first 100 days in office. In an event on 12 April, he unveiled three new priorities and aims to fulfil those before his term ends.

topStories.title: The US blockade of Iran is a gamble. Will it work?
topStories.description: The US military has the capability to mount a blockade of vessels moving in and out of the Gulf. The question is: to what end?

topStories.title: Assam govt moves SC against anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera
topStories.description: The petition was filed on Sunday through advocate Shuvodeep Roy and is likely to be taken up for hearing this week. Pawan Khera was granted bail on April 10 and given a week's time to file an application.

dailyNews.title: US-Based CEO Shares "Very Dangerous" Red Flag In A Boss
dailyNews.description: According to the CEO, a lack of support can make employees feel like they've signed up for a false promise.

dailyNews.title: Trump deletes Jesus-like AI image post following backlash from Christian voices
dailyNews.description: The now-deleted post came amid Trump’s escalating feud with Pope Leo XIV, whom he had earlier criticised as “WEAK on crime and terrible for Foreign Policy.”

dailyNews.title: US Moves To Enforce Iran Port Blockade; Warns All Ships Risk 'Interception, Capture'
dailyNews.description: Iran has warned it would treat any attempt to enforce a blockade as an act of piracy, further raising the stakes in one of the world's most critical energy corridors.

dailyNews.title: Laid-off product manager earns  ₹1.3 crore per month selling tacos, 'Pakistani-American street food'
dailyNews.description: spent nearly a decade working in tech while running pop-up food stalls on weekends. After losing his job, he decided to focus fully on building his food business.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranian ships will be ‘eliminated’ as US naval blockade begins

dailyNews.title: H1-B applications from top financial firms drops 10% in Q1FY26 amid Trump's visa policy — What we know
dailyNews.description: US financial firms saw 10% lower H-1B visa petitions, with JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs leading the drop, following President Donald Trump's visa policy changes, data showed.

dailyNews.description: US and Iran end marathon Islamabad talks without agreement, leaving fragile ceasefire under growing strain.

dailyNews.description: Bryant, who alleges she was trafficked by Jeffrey Epstein when she was 20 years old in 2002, said victims have already spoken out but justice has not followed.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not in a complete deadlock': Mediators rush to revive US-Iran talks ahead of ceasefire deadline — report
dailyNews.description: Days after the US-Iran talks failed in Pakistan, mediators are now trying to revive the negotiations before the two-week ceasefire ends on 21 April. Turkish and Egyptian foreign ministers spoke to their Pakistani counterpart on 12 April, after which they spoke to Witkoff and Iran's Araghchi.

dailyNews.title: Catholic California university to host Nancy Pelosi as commencement speaker despite abortion stance
dailyNews.description: A California Catholic university plans to host Nancy Pelosi at commencement despite her outspoken support for abortion, opposing Church teaching.

dailyNews.title: Judge dismisses Trump's $10B defamation lawsuit against The Wall Street Journal over Epstein story
dailyNews.description: A federal judge dismissed President Trump's $10 billion defamation lawsuit against The Wall Street Journal over a story about his alleged ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: US ‘coming after’ Iran beyond Strait of Hormuz blockade, ex-CENTCOM admiral warns
dailyNews.description: A former top CENTCOM commander warns the U.S.' Strait of Hormuz blockade is just the first step in coming after Iran's regime, praising President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump's meme depicting himself as Jesus Christ draws backlash from allies
dailyNews.description: President Trump's AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus Christ irked Americans on both sides of the aisle, with many calling the post blasphemous.

dailyNews.title: Iran Blockade Sets Up a Test of Which Side Can Endure More Pain
dailyNews.description: President Trump is trying to choke off the country’s lifeline with a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. But the Iranians are betting that his tolerance for political pain is limited.

dailyNews.title: Trump Said Other Countries Would Help Blockade Iran. So Far, There Are No Takers.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s announcement of a complete U.S. blockade was his latest effort to pressure Iran to negotiate after direct talks over the weekend did not yield an agreement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Takes Down Post Depicting Himself as a Jesus-Like Figure
dailyNews.description: The image, which President Trump shared on Truth Social shortly after criticizing Pope Leo, depicted him as a divine leader healing the sick.

dailyNews.title: Many Popes Before Leo Have Been Entangled in Politics. Here Are 5 of Them.
dailyNews.description: Leo XIV, under fire from President Trump, has joined predecessors like Francis and John Paul II in confronting political issues.

dailyNews.title: Pride Flag Can Fly at Stonewall After Trump Administration Reversal
dailyNews.description: The settlement ends a symbolic attack on the L.G.B.T.Q. rights movement and deals a blow to the administration’s assault on diversity initiatives.

dailyNews.title: Judge Dismisses Trump’s Suit Over WSJ Report on Birthday Card to Epstein
dailyNews.description: The judge said President Trump had not “plausibly alleged” that The Journal published the article with actual malice.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Military Transgender Ban Is Keeping Workers on Expensive Paid Leave
dailyNews.description: Highly trained service members have been put on paid leave for nearly a year as they wait for the military to decide their fate.

dailyNews.title: World War II Veterans Say NATO Is Imperfect but Necessary
dailyNews.description: As President Trump renews threats to pull the United States from NATO, veterans reflect on the alliance that has existed more than 75 years.
